step_rationale: Advanced glycation end-product marker post-MI; correlates with cardiopulmonary bypass and oxidative stress.
mechanism: Glycation end-product pentosidine post-reperfusion marks oxidative injury and extracellular-matrix protein cross-linking.

references.title: Impact of myocardial revascularization surgery on the plasma metabolome.
references.journal: Metabolomics : Official journal of the Metabolomic Society
